queue.task: Review today's HenryDB work: 20 bugs fixed, 200+ tests. What's the hardest remaining problem? GROUP BY alias, query optimizer gaps, or file-backed persistence?
queue.summary: Reviewed 94 tasks today. Not in breadth spiral — found genuine bugs. Hardest remaining: file-backed persistence (multi-session). This session: GROUP BY alias fix + adversarial stress testing, then Monkey evening.

queue.goal: Fix neural-net CI failures (23 legacy test failures from API mismatches, broken since Apr 11)
Deepen HenryDB: fix GROUP BY alias resolution, improve query optimizer cost model accuracy
queue.summary: Found 2 real GROUP BY bugs: (1) simple column alias not resolved (GROUP BY person gives 1 group instead of 2), (2) ordinal position not supported. Planned 3 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Fix GROUP BY simple column alias resolution (GROUP BY person when SELECT name AS person)
queue.summary: Fixed GROUP BY simple column alias resolution. Added columnAliasMap for type:column aliases. GROUP BY person when SELECT name AS person now works correctly. All 39 GROUP BY tests pass.

queue.task: Fix GROUP BY ordinal position support (GROUP BY 1, GROUP BY 2)
queue.summary: Implemented GROUP BY ordinal position support. GROUP BY 1/2/etc now resolves to corresponding SELECT columns. Works with plain columns, expressions, functions, CASE. All 39 GROUP BY tests pass.

queue.task: Write comprehensive GROUP BY alias + ordinal test suite
queue.summary: 18 comprehensive GROUP BY alias + ordinal tests: simple/expression/CASE/function aliases, ordinal 1/2/multiple, HAVING, ORDER BY, NULL, shadowing. All pass.
Skipped — orphan placeholder from removed plan T2

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed henrydb + workspace. Dashboard healthy.

queue.task: What's the most interesting unsolved problem in HenryDB? Where would going deeper teach me the most?
queue.summary: Direction: hunt remaining test failures to push pass rate higher. Focus on whatever class of failures is most common. Alternative: query bytecode VM or incremental vacuum. Going with failure hunting — highest ROI for quality.

queue.goal: HenryDB stress testing: find bugs through adversarial query patterns and edge cases
queue.summary: Fixed histogram equality estimation bug — exact-match buckets now sum full count instead of dividing by ndv. Estimate for val=1 (900/1000 rows) went from 31 to 884. Planned 3 BUILD tasks.
